title: scleranthus perennis subsp. dichotomus
intro: Scleranthus perennis subsp. dichotomus, also known as white heath, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Scleranthus perennis subsp. dichotomus include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, soothe anxiety and insomnia, and reduce inflammation. This plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
